reviews.comment:
Quiero expresar mi más sincero agradecimiento al personal por la excelente atención que recibí durante mi visita. El desayuno fue muy rico, tienen muy buenos precios y los baños estaban impecables. La amabilidad y la eficiencia del personal fueron notables.

(Translated by Google)
I want to express my sincere gratitude to the staff for the excellent service I received during my visit. The breakfast was delicious, the prices were very reasonable, and the restrooms were spotless. The staff's friendliness and efficiency were remarkable.
